store.name: Sunprint Field Desk
store.tagline: Cyanotype kits for botanical collectors and slow-craft artists

collections.name: Starter Kits
collections.description: Ready-to-print cyanotype kits for first sessions, balconies, families, and workshop hosts.

collections.name: Print Surfaces
collections.description: Pre-treated papers, cotton squares, tote blanks, postcards, bookmarks, and archival card stock.

collections.name: Exposure & Rinse Tools
collections.description: Contact frames, acrylic sheets, clips, foam boards, trays, rinse bottles, drying twine, and gloves.

collections.name: Botanical Collection Goods
collections.description: Pocket plant presses, specimen envelopes, field scissors, labeling tags, wax pencils, and motif cards.

collections.name: Chemistry & Finishing
collections.description: Brush-on cyanotype chemistry, measuring cups, foam brushes, toning samples, sleeves, and logbooks.

collections.name: Curated Visual Bundles
collections.description: Outcome-led kits for fern studies, coastal drift prints, garden weddings, and winter lace shadows.

products.name: First Cyanotype Paper Kit
products.description: Pre-treated papers, acrylic sheet, clips, exposure card, rinse guide, and a field logbook for first prints.

products.name: Balcony Sunprint Kit
products.description: Compact frame, postcard papers, foam board, clips, and shadow timing tips for apartment light.

products.name: Family Nature-Walk Kit
products.description: Kid-friendly paper packs, specimen envelopes, label tags, rinse bottle, and a four-print scavenger prompt.

products.name: Classroom Host Bundle
products.description: Thirty paper sheets, shared exposure frames, gloves, trays, clips, tags, and instructor-ready timing cards.

products.name: Indigo Paper Pack
products.description: Twenty 8x10 pre-treated sheets for botanical silhouettes, lace tests, and finished wall studies.

products.name: Cotton Fabric Squares
products.description: Twelve hemmed cotton squares prepared for quilt blocks, textile studies, and sample swatches.

products.name: Postcard Sunprint Set
products.description: Sixteen mailable cyanotype postcards with matching specimen notes for garden correspondence.

products.name: Tote Blank Pair
products.description: Two prepared cotton totes for bold fern, lace, and found-object impressions.

products.name: Pocket Plant Press
products.description: Portable press with blotters, straps, and reusable field labels for collecting leaves and small flowers.

products.name: Contact Frame Set
products.description: Wood contact frame with clear acrylic sheet, backing board, and brass clips for crisp silhouettes.

products.name: Rinse Tray Pair
products.description: Nested rinse trays sized for cyanotype paper packs, with a gentle squeeze rinse bottle.

products.name: Print Logbook
products.description: Archive dates, plants, exposure times, weather, toning choices, and final print notes.

products.name: Brush-On Cyanotype Chemistry
products.description: Measured two-part brush-on cyanotype chemistry for artists ready to coat custom papers or cloth.

products.name: Toning Sample Flight
products.description: Small-batch toning samples for testing warm, smoky, and botanical finish variations.

products.name: Archival Sleeve Pack
products.description: Clear archival sleeves for storing finished cyanotype studies, postcards, and seasonal series.

products.name: Fern Study Set
products.description: Pressed fern cards, 8x10 paper, archival sleeves, and logbook prompts for a wall-ready plant series.

products.name: Coastal Drift Kit
products.description: Postcards, specimen envelopes, shell-safe layout guides, and rinse tools for beach walk impressions.

products.name: Garden Wedding Place-Card Kit
products.description: Archival card stock, pressed motif cards, wax pencils, and drying line for handmade table settings.

products.name: Winter Lace & Shadow Set
products.description: Lace motif templates, postcard blanks, toning samples, and exposure tips for low-season light.
